title: Tax Audits & Appeals
text: Being audited by the IRS or Colorado's Department of Revenue? Consulting with us may be the smartest decision you make. We've handled hundreds.

title: Reducing Tax Debts
text: Resolving tax debts is not as simple as many believe. With decades of experience handling IRS collection cases for large corporations to everyday people.

title: Individual Tax Controversy
text: Audits, unfiled returns, undisclosed foreign assets, back taxes, tax liens or levies — we handle the full range of individual tax problems.

title: Civil & Criminal Tax Litigation
text: When disputes can't be resolved, litigation may be inescapable. We are tax litigation specialists with more courtroom time than nearly any firm in Colorado.

title: Business Tax Controversy
text: Federal, state, and local tax compliance problems can lead to the early demise of your business. We've helped hundreds of owners resolve these issues.

title: Accountant Liability
text: We bring special expertise to representing the accounting profession. Several of our attorneys hold CPA licenses — we know the field from the inside.
